original_statement: hideki mutoh and marco andretti were both a part of which team in this race?
mutated_statement: someone and someone were both a part of which something in this event?
mutation_analysis: [Entity anonymization] + [Slot generalization] + [Event-term generalization]: Proper competitor names replaced by generic placeholders | "team" generalized to "something" | "race" generalized to "event" (hideki mutoh, marco andretti → someone and someone | team → something | race → event)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought可以看出代理直接列出并确认了多个车队（如 Chip Ganassi Racing、Penske Racing、Andretti Green Racing 等），并用“These match exactly the teams listed in the Prediction Answer”表述，未提及问题的占位符化或泛化导致的不明确性。具体表现为：在执行日志和判定中没有任何关于歧义、不确定性或需要澄清的表述，代理直接依据表格信息给出具体答案且认为答案为“Correct”。因此代理没有识别到原始问题被泛化（实体被替换为 someone、槽位泛化为 something、race 泛化为 event）带来的模糊性，符合“无法意识到指令模糊”的分类标准。
